text.title: Performance Architecture Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: SLO row reads 'page must feel fast'.
antipattern.fix: Force numeric translation (e.g. 'p95 < 200 ms') before merge.

antipattern.symptom: PR adds an index 'because it helps'; no baseline + after measurement.
antipattern.fix: Require before/after k6 numbers in the PR; reject otherwise.

antipattern.symptom: Cache added inside the DB (materialised view) for a request that could be served from the CDN.
antipattern.fix: Audit cacheable GETs; route to CDN with appropriate TTL.

antipattern.symptom: k6 thresholds are 1000ms p95 while SLO is 200ms; test always passes.
antipattern.root-cause: r4 violated; thresholds copied from template.
antipattern.fix: Generate thresholds from the SLO; lint check that they match.
